case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. CHRISTIAN FITTON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-11-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-09-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY ROSEBEL SINGH, SR. COLLECTION OFFICER. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT STIPULATE TO PRO TEM JUDGE. DEFENDANT CRHISTIAN FITTON DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
